name: NeededPlus: Overhaul
description: V3 pack structured into brewing/ and crafting/ folders. Adds spirits, sodas, vinegar, tinctures, stills and bottling gear, chem drying, energy synergies, recycler expansions, and itemgroup merges. No mapgen. Updated to v0.3: integrated brewing/crafting/itemgroups. v0.4: hydroponics, materials/polymers 2.0, power distribution & safety added. v0.4.3: major fermentation & food processes (koji→miso/soy sauce/sake, tempeh, cold-smoking/curing, yogurt/kefir, oil pressing & nut butters, chocolate chain, fish sauce/garum, pectin/jams & fruit leather, gelatin/bone broth/glue, fermented condiments).
